description: Architect responsible for designing, configuring, and managing enterprise cloud computing environments, choosing service options, and ensuring reliable, cost-efficient scaling.

junior.expectations: Focus on setting up IAM policies, maintaining EC2 configuration, setting up VPC subnets, and writing simple Terraform declarations.

mid.expectations: Design autoscaling architectures, integrate multiple cloud systems (e.g. S3 to RDS to ECS), implement security audits, and scale load balancers.

senior.expectations: Lead corporate cloud migration strategy, optimize multi-million dollar budgets, establish global multi-region failovers, and write custom Terraform provider scripts.
